subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of Abdu'l-Baha! Your service at the Sacred Threshold of the Blessed Beauty during the day of attainment to the divine Presence was accepted, and after His ascension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء خدمتت در آستان مقدس جمال ابهی در یوم لقا مقبول و بعد از صعود
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
